description: A customer has moved and needs to update their mailing address and phone number on file.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the customer's identity before making account changes.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully verifies the customer's identity.

nodes.task_description: Collect the new address and phone number from the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately records the new contact information.

nodes.task_description: Update the customer's profile in the central CRM system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the customer record.
